content:
to make it about me-me-me-me-me(again), while every glass-housed-resident lifts their black-kettle to throw at me, i never have to deflect that from you…so truly, and earnestly, that my friend, is gracious and singular.

sorry for the unprompted letter! ill pretend im at a wedding, or maybe my own funeral, and im giving a speech about one of my greatest friends.

in my california-sobriety (though we need a new term [eschewing the awkward 2 decade long simmering smoking pot {see:kettle} & imbibing the weekend cocktail with jess tenenbaum aka miss christmas tree aka the jewish groundhog chased by her shadow])…

I’m spending a lot of time reflecting on what is important, cutting out the negative and the one-way exchanges, and for the first time since the last time (trust that this guy is aware of the repetition and the cycles), i see things, with blinders secured though, my line of sight is on the prize, the prize being long-term satisfaction over instant gratification. which is another reverence i have of you, your ability to self-correct, modulate, etc.

anyway, as we spoke around this circle before, take it fucking easy, lets have the ice cream, indulge in the two slices of bread that the spoon of peanut butter is oft accompanied by, maybe even some jelly and have us a whole goddamn sandwich.
context: From document: for context on the mid depression, idk how much of your road was paved… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/2)
